message:
feat(messaging): add NATS client with Cx integration

Introduce a pure Rust NATS client implementing the NATS text protocol
with full Cx integration for cancel-correct publish/subscribe.

Features:
- NatsClient: Connection management with automatic reconnection
- Publish/subscribe with topic wildcard support (foo.*, foo.>)
- Request/reply pattern with correlation tracking
- Message acknowledgement for JetStream compatibility
- Subscription with buffered message channel

Integration:
- All operations respect Cx cancellation
- Backpressure through bounded channels
- Timeout support on request/reply

Based on NATS protocol specification:
https://docs.nats.io/reference/reference-protocols/nats-protocol

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
